title: HOOD RIVER VETERANS SERVICES - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER COUNTY VETERAN SERVICE OFFICE HOOD RIVER VETERANS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF County Veterans Service Offices (CVSOs) serve as the entry points to understanding the Department of Veteran's Affairs (VA) benefits, resources, and entitlements available to veterans, their dependents, and survivors. CVSOs can provide the following: -Veterans' benefits counseling and claims preparation assistance, as well as advocacy throughout the claims process -Counseling on federal VA benefits and other state and federal ancillary benefits -Educational benefit claims assistance -Assistance with enrollment in health care for veterans and qualified family members -Assistance requesting military service documents -Service-connected and non-service-related disability and survivor benefits -Burial benefits -Information about veteran home loans 309 State Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Veterans with any discharge status other than dishonorable and their immediate family members (spouse, un-remarried surviving spouse, child, or stepchild). Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-12:30pm and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 386-1080 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-1080 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: DD214, birth certificate, and if applicable marriage certificate, divorce decree, death certificates. Additional documents may be requested. AREA SERVED: Hood River County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Burial Benefits * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues General Health Insurance Information/Counseling * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Military Records Other Services Offered At This Location: TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - OREGON VETERANS EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER COUNTY VETERAN SERVICE OFFICE
